scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n frontend,api,worker -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run worker:dev -w backend"
scripts.setup: npm run preflight && npm install && npm run env:setup && npm run infra:up && npm run prisma:generate -w backend && npm run db:migrate -w backend && npm run db:seed -w backend
scripts.check: npm run check -w backend && npm run check -w frontend
